history.content: how will be my next 6 months in terms of health, finance and carreer

I am Parashara, here to guide you with insights based on your birth details.

In the next six months, your health appears stable, thanks to Venus in your sixth house, which often brings comfort and well-being. You may experience good vitality and a sense of balance.

Financially, you may find some fluctuations. While Venus can enhance your wealth zone, the presence of the Moon in your twelfth house suggests potential expenses or hidden costs. Be mindful of your spending.

In your career, the upcoming period may be favorable, especially as Venus influences your work environment positively. You might receive recognition or opportunities for advancement, particularly during the Venus sub-period starting late December 2025.

Stay focused on your goals, and remember to manage your finances wisely.

For major life decisions, I recommend consulting a qualified astrologer or palm reader for a personal reading.
